member.name: T:Alphabet.Modules.OrderModule.Api.OrderModuleEndpoints
member.summary: Exposes endpoint registration for the sample order module.

member.summary: Demonstrates a self-contained command within a module.

member.summary: Demonstrates a self-contained command within a module.

member.name: T:Alphabet.Modules.OrderModule.Domain.Order
member.summary: Represents a lightweight example bounded context aggregate.

member.summary: Represents the order persistence adapter boundary for the sample module.
